title: The Production AI Playbook: Deploying Agents at Enterprise Scale — Sandipan Bhaumik, Databricks
summary: Sandipan Bhaumik from Databricks presents the Production AI Playbook, a framework for deploying agents at enterprise scale. The framework rests on five pillars: evaluation with numerical success metrics defined upfront, observability with comprehensive agent tracing for regulatory compliance, data foundation rigor, multi-agent orchestration patterns, and governance systems that caught 47 PII breaches in testing before launch.
writeup: Sandipan Bhaumik of Databricks lays out the Production AI Playbook, a framework for deploying agents at enterprise scale. It rests on five pillars: evaluation with numerical success metrics defined upfront, observability through comprehensive agent tracing for regulatory compliance, data foundation rigor, multi-agent orchestration patterns, and governance systems. The governance emphasis is concrete: in testing, those systems caught 47 PII breaches before launch, illustrating why the controls matter ahead of production.
